heading: Organization
label: 70501 Organization
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7050136:571., §§ 1, 2, .Aug. 24, 1954, ch. 91168 Stat. 79536:572.This section is substituted for the source provisions for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate executed and unnecessary words.

Amendments2025—Subsecs. (b), (c). redesignated subsec. (c) as (b) and struck out former subsec. (b). Prior to amendment, text of subsec. (b) read as follows: “The corporation is declared to be incorporated and domiciled in the District of Columbia.”Pub. L. 119–57
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7050136:571., §§ 1, 2, .Aug. 24, 1954, ch. 91168 Stat. 79536:572.This section is substituted for the source provisions for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate executed and unnecessary words.

Amendments2025—Subsecs. (b), (c). redesignated subsec. (c) as (b) and struck out former subsec. (b). Prior to amendment, text of subsec. (b) read as follows: “The corporation is declared to be incorporated and domiciled in the District of Columbia.”Pub. L. 119–57

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: The Foundation of the Federal Bar Association (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Perpetual Existence
children.label: b .—Perpetual Existence
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the corporation has perpetual existence.
